data.title: RED zone parsing fails for .test-index entries with many test files
data.description: record-test-status.sh does not parse RED markers ([marker_name]) correctly when they appear in .test-index lines with 20+ comma-separated test files mapping to a single source file (plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md). The markers are syntactically correct but local_marker is always empty in the parser output. This blocks committing changes to SKILL.md when some associated test files are intentionally RED (TDD workflow). Workaround: split the .test-index entry or commit SKILL.md changes only when all associated tests pass.
